title: The Effect of Soviet Maternity Benefits on Fertility
notes: All-eventually-treated: 2 cohorts (1981 early=32 oblasts, 1982 late=50 oblasts). 82 oblasts, 12 years (1975-1986). SA disabled (Pattern 36, CONFIRMED: inverted signs). CS-NT disabled (no never-treated). Weight = numwomen_79. Event study truncated to e<=0: after 1982 ALL units treated, year FEs become contaminated (1982=3.7, 1983=9.2, 1984=7.7...), TWFE ES dummies explode (e+1=8.7, e+5=14.8) — artifact, not real effects. CS-NYT and Gardner correctly stop at e=0 (no clean control after 1982). All 3 estimators agree at e=0: TWFE=2.4, CS-NYT~2.0, Gardner=2.1. Static TWFE ATT=1.09 is reliable (identified from timing variation). Analysis data built by data/395/build_analysis_data.R.
